title: We Showed Up — How the Trailblazer Community Lit Up Dreamforce 2025
author: Sasha Taylor

sections.heading: The Heartbeat of Dreamforce: Community
sections.text: When community gathers, something extraordinary happens. Dreamforce ‘25 was no exception. Thousands of Trailblazers, Agentblazers, and partners from around the world filled Moscone Center with energy, creativity, and connection — turning the world’s largest AI conference into a family reunion powered bywe. Atop the Trailblazer Forest, the Community Cove served as the central hub for connection, learning, and celebration. The goal was simple: bring all Salesforce communities together — Trailblazer, Salesblazer, Serviceblazer, Agentblazer, MuleSoft, Tableau, Slack, and more — under one roof. The result? 86 community-led sessions23 networking sessionsacross roles, regions, and industries43 Campfires and technical sessions, led entirely by community members The Cove buzzed with excitement from morning to evening — a place where first-timers found mentors, MVPs shared stories, and longtime friends finally met in person. “The energy in the Community Cove was electric — every conversation reminded you how big and connected our ecosystem really is.”

sections.heading: The Community Connector Helped Trailblazers Find Their People
sections.text: One of this year’s biggest hits was the Community Connector, a fun, interactive quiz designed to match attendees with the Salesforce communities that best fit their skills and interests. After completing the quiz, attendees met one-on-one with Community Consultants — Salesforce Community Managers who helped them take the next step in their community journey. And the experience didn’t end there. Participants could step into the photobooth to create their own AI-generated Trading Card — a personalized keepsake celebrating who they are in the Salesforce ecosystem — and then pin it to the Community Photo Wall, joining thousands of faces from around the world. “It guided people through their community journey in a fun, trackable way — turning curiosity into connection.”

raw_html:
The Heartbeat of Dreamforce: Community

When community gathers, something extraordinary happens. Dreamforce ‘25 was no exception. Thousands of Trailblazers, Agentblazers, and partners from around the world filled Moscone Center with energy, creativity, and connection — turning the world’s largest AI conference into a family reunion powered by we.

Atop the Trailblazer Forest, the Community Cove served as the central hub for connection, learning, and celebration. The goal was simple: bring all Salesforce communities together — Trailblazer, Salesblazer, Serviceblazer, Agentblazer, MuleSoft, Tableau, Slack, and more — under one roof.

The result?

  • 86 community-led sessions
  • 23 networking sessions across roles, regions, and industries
  • 43 Campfires and technical sessions, led entirely by community members

The Cove buzzed with excitement from morning to evening — a place where first-timers found mentors, MVPs shared stories, and longtime friends finally met in person.

“The energy in the Community Cove was electric — every conversation reminded you how big and connected our ecosystem really is.”

The Community Connector Helped Trailblazers Find Their People

One of this year’s biggest hits was the Community Connector, a fun, interactive quiz designed to match attendees with the Salesforce communities that best fit their skills and interests. After completing the quiz, attendees met one-on-one with Community Consultants — Salesforce Community Managers who helped them take the next step in their community journey.

And the experience didn’t end there.

Participants could step into the photobooth to create their own AI-generated Trading Card — a personalized keepsake celebrating who they are in the Salesforce ecosystem — and then pin it to the Community Photo Wall, joining thousands of faces from around the world.

“It guided people through their community journey in a fun, trackable way — turning curiosity into connection.”

AI Trading Cards: The Most Collectible Moment at Dreamforce

If you saw a line in the Community Cove, it probably led to the AI Trading Card Station. Trailblazers designed their own collectible cards featuring AI-generated superhero portraits inspired by prompts like Rainbow, Sunrise, Aurora Stars, and Clouds — each bursting with color and optimism.

Every card included:

  • A custom portrait unique to each attendee
  • Their top community match
  • A digital version to share and three printed cards — one to keep, one to trade, and one for the wall

By week’s end:

  • 2,500+ cards printed and pinned to the Photo Wall
  • 15 unique community designs represented
  • One unforgettable display of belonging

“It wasn’t just swag — it was storytelling. Every card captured who you are in the Salesforce Community.”

Every Community Showed Up — and Shined

Dreamforce 2025 was more connected than ever, bringing together every corner of the Salesforce ecosystem. Across campus, each community hosted sessions and meetups that showcased innovation and collaboration in action.

  • Agentblazers explored the future of AI with peer-led sessions on building agentic solutions.
  • MuleSoft Community hosted the ever-popular Sip & Sync Meetup and technical roundtables.
  • Tableau Community led hands-on analytics labs and the Women in Tech Meetup.
  • Slack Community packed the house for Reimagining Work for the Agentic Enterprise.
  • Partnerblazers shared growth stories, customer wins, and collaboration strategies.

“Whether you build, sell, service, or dream — there was a space for you here.”

We Connected, Learned, and Laughed — Together

Beyond the activations, Dreamforce 2025 was filled with moments of connection that reminded everyone why this community matters. From the First-Timers Experience and MVP meetups to Unscripted: The Great Debate, Ask Us Anything: Salesforce MVPs, and the Swag & Sticker Swap, Trailblazers found countless ways to engage, celebrate, and learn from one another.

Even spontaneous hallway chats and shared meals turned into new friendships and future collaborations.

“Dreamforce is more than sessions — it’s a spark that keeps our community connected long after the week ends.”

Why It Matters

The Trailblazer Community didn’t just attend Dreamforce 2025 — we made Dreamforce 2025. Through authentic stories, creative activations, and meaningful connections, we turned a global event into a shared experience of learning and belonging.

  • We built connections that will last all year.
  • We showed what happens when every voice has a stage.
  • We celebrated the communities that make Salesforce strong.

Because when Trailblazers show up, everything changes.

Keep the Momentum Going

Your Dreamforce journey doesn’t end here. Keep blazing new trails:

  • Join your Salesforce community: trailblazer.salesforce.com
  • Share your favorite Dreamforce moment: Use #TrailblazerCommunity and #DF25
  • Follow up with new connections: A quick message can spark your next collaboration
  • Continue learning: trailhead.salesforce.com

Here’s to the Trailblazers, MVPs, first-timers, mentors, and dreamers.

We showed up. We connected. We celebrated.

And now, we keep going.
